'''bazate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:labourously|labourously]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-z-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labourously|labourously]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bazate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:bazate|bazate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bazatesher|bazatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bazatesherĂ«m|bazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bazatero|bazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bazateshĂ«|bazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bazateshĂ«m|bazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibazatero|gokibazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibazateshĂ«|gokibazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibazateshĂ«m|gokibazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobazankerom|gobazankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobazankeshĂ«|gobazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobazankeshĂ«m|gobazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobazankeya|gobazankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bazaterom|bazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bazatemu|bazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bazateya|bazateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibazaterom|gokibazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibazatemu|gokibazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibazateya|gokibazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:bazazate|bazazate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bazazatesher|bazazatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bazazatesherĂ«m|bazazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bazazatero|bazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bazazateshĂ«|bazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bazazateshĂ«m|bazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibazazatero|gokibazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibazazateshĂ«|gokibazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibazazateshĂ«m|gokibazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobazazankerom|gobazazankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobazazankeshĂ«|gobazazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobazazankeshĂ«m|gobazazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobazazankeya|gobazazankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bazazaterom|bazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bazazatemu|bazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bazazateya|bazazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibazazaterom|gokibazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibazazatemu|gokibazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibazazateya|gokibazazateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:bĂŠzĂŠte|bĂŠzĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bĂŠzĂŠtesher|bĂŠzĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m|bĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠzĂŠtero|bĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|bĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|bĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠzĂŠtero|gokibĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gokibĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gokibĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobĂŠzĂŠnkerom|gobĂŠzĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«|gobĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gobĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobĂŠzĂŠnkeya|gobĂŠzĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠzĂŠterom|bĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠzĂŠtemu|bĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bĂŠzĂŠteya|bĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠzĂŠterom|gokibĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠzĂŠtemu|gokibĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibĂŠzĂŠteya|gokibĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:bafzafte|bafzafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bafzaftesher|bafzaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafzaftesherĂ«m|bafzaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafzaftero|bafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bafzafteshĂ«|bafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafzafteshĂ«m|bafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafzaftero|gokibafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibafzafteshĂ«|gokibafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafzafteshĂ«m|gokibafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobafzafnkerom|gobafzafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobafzafnkeshĂ«|gobafzafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobafzafnkeshĂ«m|gobafzafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobafzafnkeya|gobafzafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafzafterom|bafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafzaftemu|bafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bafzafteya|bafzafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafzafterom|gokibafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafzaftemu|gokibafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibafzafteya|gokibafzafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
